title: Put your photos on the map
body: For some time now *Flickr* has had the option to place your photos on a world map, it's a manual task and if you don't get used to doing it, it always ends up being tedious. Now it seems that *Flickr* wants to promote this functionality and for that it has created **[Flickr places](http://flickr.com/places/ "Flickr places")**, a site where we can explore the entire world based on the photos that thousands of users of this social network have placed in the location where they took them. Let's hope that soon cameras with integrated GPS become widespread and these tasks are done automatically.
